rationale.R1.7: Audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (Kowalski et al. 2019 citation is incorrect and contradicts the adjacent Rei et al. 2020 citation)
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
